btech_mechanical_engineering,BTech / B.E. Mechanical Engineering,"1️⃣ **BTech / B.E. Mechanical Engineering** ⚙️

Bachelor of Technology / Engineering in Mechanical Engineering (BTech / BE Mechanical Engineering) is a 4-year undergraduate engineering program that focuses on the design, analysis, manufacturing, and maintenance of mechanical systems.
Students learn about thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, machine design, robotics, and manufacturing processes, applying concepts to industries like automotive, aerospace, energy, and manufacturing.
Pioneers in mechanics include James Watt and Isambard Kingdom Brunel.

column3: Top engineering colleges may require 60% or above
